title: Layer 3: China Resilience Indicators
title_zh: 第三层：中国抗打击力指标
desc: Whether China's relative advantage materializes depends on these
desc_zh: 中国相对优势能否兑现，取决于这些

tradeSurplus.threshold: Record high. Sustained >$100B = structural advantage confirmed
tradeSurplus.threshold_zh: 创纪录。持续>$1000亿=结构优势确认

chinaTradeShare.threshold: WTO: #1 exporter since 2009. Share rising despite tariff headwinds
chinaTradeShare.threshold_zh: WTO：2009年起全球第一出口大国。关税压力下份额仍在上升
chinaTradeShare.note: China's share of global goods exports rose to ~15% in 2025, up from ~14.2% in 2020. Absolute export value ~$3.8T.
chinaTradeShare.note_zh: 中国全球商品出口份额2025年升至约15%，2020年为14.2%。出口绝对值约$3.8万亿。

chinaTradeWeight.threshold: No single '% of global tonnage' stat — disaggregated by commodity
chinaTradeWeight.threshold_zh: 无单一'全球吨位占比'统计——按商品类别分列
chinaTradeWeight.note: Individual commodity shares are each sourced from their respective industry data. No credible single 'total tonnage share' exists.
chinaTradeWeight.note_zh: 各商品类别的份额来自各自行业的统计数据。不存在可信的单一'总吨位占比'数据。

industrialProfits.threshold: Positive = cost pass-through working; Negative = margin squeeze
industrialProfits.threshold_zh: 正数=成本传导能力ok；负数=利润被挤压
industrialProfits.note: Key: export sector profitability vs domestic. Watch sectoral breakdown.
industrialProfits.note_zh: 关键看出口部门vs内销部门的利润率分布。

fxSettlement.note: Lagging indicator but critical for RMB direction conviction
fxSettlement.note_zh: 滞后指标，但对RMB方向判断至关重要

cfetsIndex.threshold_zh: >104 = 央行可能干预；102-104 = 温和可控
cfetsIndex.note: RMB at 6.7774 (daily). CFETS index last known: 101.41 (Jun 2). Updated 2026-06-11
cfetsIndex.note_zh: 人民币汇率6.7774（每日）。CFETS指数上次已知：101.41（6月2日）。更新于 2026-06-11

chinaEvExports.threshold: Monitor BYD + SAIC Middle East/SEA shipments
chinaEvExports.threshold_zh: 关注比亚迪+上汽中东/东南亚出货量
chinaEvExports.note: Hormuz → competitor logistics cost up → China EV price gap widens
chinaEvExports.note_zh: 霍尔木兹→竞争对手物流成本上升→中国电动车价差扩大
